thresholdSummary: Initech walks if Vendor refuses any uncapped exposure on Section 9 AND will not commit to 24h breach notification with written follow-up. They walked once before (PaymentsAPI 2023) on a smaller delta.

citations.quote: the foregoing cap shall not apply to claims arising from a breach of Section 9 (Data Protection) or any unauthorized access to or disclosure of Client Data, in respect of which Vendor's liability shall be uncapped
Vendor shall not transfer, replicate, or back up Client Data outside of Ontario without Client's prior written consent
Vendor shall notify Client within twenty-four (24) hours of becoming aware of any unauthorized access to Client Data
